# betaselectr: Do Selective Standardization in Structural Equation Models and Regression Models

(Version 0.1.3.1, updated on 2026-03-30, [release
history](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/news/index.html))

It computes *beta*s-select, coefficients (*beta*s) after standardization
in structural equation models and regression models with only *select*ed
variables standardized. It supports models with moderation, with product
terms formed appropriately (formed *after* standardization). It can also
form confidence intervals that takes into account the standardization
appropriately.

For more information on this package, please visit its GitHub page:

<https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/>

# Installation

The latest developmental version of this package can be installed by
`remotes::install_github`:

``` r
remotes::install_github("sfcheung/betaselectr")
```

# Issues

If you have any suggestions and found any bugs, please feel feel to open
a GitHub issue. Thanks.

<https://github.com/sfcheung/betaselectr/issues>

# Package index

## Main Functions

- [`lav_betaselect()`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/lav_betaselect.md)
  : Betas-Select in a 'lavaan'-Model
- [`lm_betaselect()`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/lm_betaselect.md)
  [`glm_betaselect()`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/lm_betaselect.md)
  [`print(`*`<lm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/lm_betaselect.md)
  [`print(`*`<glm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/lm_betaselect.md)
  [`raw_output()`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/lm_betaselect.md)
  : Betas-Select in a Regression Model

## Helper Functions

- [`std_data()`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/std_data.md)
  : Standardize Selected Variables

## Methods for lav_betaselect()

- [`print(`*`<lav_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/print.lav_betaselect.md)
  : Print a 'lav_betaselect' Object
- [`coef(`*`<lav_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/coef.lav_betaselect.md)
  : Coefficients of a 'lav_betaselect'-Class Object
- [`confint(`*`<lav_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/confint.lav_betaselect.md)
  : Confidence Intervals for a 'lav_betaselect'-Class Object

## Methods for lm_betaselect() and glm_betaselect()

- [`anova(`*`<lm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/anova.lm_betaselect.md)
  [`anova(`*`<glm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/anova.lm_betaselect.md)
  : ANOVA Tables For 'lm_betaselect' and 'glm_betaselect' Objects

- [`coef(`*`<lm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/coef.lm_betaselect.md)
  [`coef(`*`<glm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/coef.lm_betaselect.md)
  : Coefficients of Beta-Select in Linear Models

- [`confint(`*`<lm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/confint.lm_betaselect.md)
  [`confint(`*`<glm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/confint.lm_betaselect.md)
  : Confidence Interval for 'lm_betaselect' or 'glm_betaselect' Objects

- [`getCall(`*`<lm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/getCall.lm_betaselect.md)
  [`getCall(`*`<glm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/getCall.lm_betaselect.md)
  : Call in an 'lm_betaselect' or 'glm_betaselect' Object

- [`predict(`*`<lm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/predict.lm_betaselect.md)
  : Predict Method for an 'lm_betaselect' Object

- [`summary(`*`<lm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/summary.lm_betaselect.md)
  [`print(`*`<summary.lm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/summary.lm_betaselect.md)
  : Summary of an 'lm_betaselect'-Class Object

- [`vcov(`*`<lm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/vcov.lm_betaselect.md)
  [`vcov(`*`<glm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/vcov.lm_betaselect.md)
  :

  The 'vcov' Method for 'lm_betaselect' and `glm_betaselect` Objects

- [`predict(`*`<glm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/predict.glm_betaselect.md)
  : Predict Method for a 'glm_betaselect' Object

- [`summary(`*`<glm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/summary.glm_betaselect.md)
  [`print(`*`<summary.glm_betaselect>`*`)`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/summary.glm_betaselect.md)
  : Summary of an 'glm_betaselect'-Class Object

## Datasets

Datasets used in examples.

- [`data_test_medmod`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/data_test_medmod.md)
  : Test Dataset with Moderator and Mediator
- [`data_test_mod_cat`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/data_test_mod_cat.md)
  : Test Dataset with Moderator and Categorical Variables
- [`data_test_mod_cat2`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/data_test_mod_cat2.md)
  : Test Dataset with Moderator and Categorical Variables (Version 2)
- [`data_test_mod_cat_binary`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/reference/data_test_mod_cat_binary.md)
  : Test Dataset with a Binary Outcome Variable

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Beta-Select Demonstration: Logistic Regression by
  \`glm()\`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/articles/betaselectr_glm.md):
- [Beta-Select Demonstration: SEM by
  'lavaan'](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/articles/betaselectr_lav.md):
- [Beta-Select Demonstration: Regression by
  \`lm()\`](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/articles/betaselectr_lm.md):
- [How lav_betaselect()
  Works](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/articles/lav_betaselect_technical.md):
- [How lm_betaselect() and glm_betaselect()
  Work](https://sfcheung.github.io/betaselectr/articles/lm_betaselect_technical.md):
